name: Feature request
about: New skill, new rule file in an existing skill, new hook, or improvement to existing content
labels: enhancement
---

## What are you trying to do?

<!-- The task or review scenario that isn't well-covered today -->

## Which skill or area does this affect?

<!-- e.g. apex:postgres-review is missing an indexing.md rule file -->

## What would good content look like?

<!-- Draft rules, anti-patterns, or worked examples if you have them — even rough notes help -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Other skills, external resources, or workarounds you've already tried -->
